member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers
member.summary: Shared helpers for projecting object data into tabular structures.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetColumnNames(System.Object)
member.summary: Resolves column names from a dictionary or public readable properties.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value for the specified column from a dictionary or property.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.NonDisposingMemoryStream
member.summary: MemoryStream that suppresses disposal so OpenXml packages can close without losing the buffer.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupCSharpEmitter
member.summary: Emits starter C# code from the semantic OfficeIMO markup AST.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupEmitterOptions
member.summary: Options shared by target-specific code emitters.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupPowerShellEmitter
member.summary: Emits starter PowerShell code from the semantic OfficeIMO markup AST.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupProfile
member.summary: Office authoring profile used to validate profile-specific markup nodes.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupProfile.Common
member.summary: Common Markdown-compatible content without Office-specific extensions.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupProfile.Presentation
member.summary: PowerPoint presentation authoring profile.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupProfile.Document
member.summary: Word document authoring profile.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupProfile.Workbook
member.summary: Excel workbook authoring profile.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupNodeKind
member.summary: Semantic node categories exposed by the unified OfficeIMO markup AST.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupDiagnosticSeverity
member.summary: Severity of parser or validation diagnostics.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupDiagnostic
member.summary: Parser or validation diagnostic.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupNode
member.summary: Base semantic AST node. Nodes describe office intent, not a C# or PowerShell API call.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupBlock
member.summary: Base class for block-level semantic nodes.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupDocument
member.summary: Root semantic document produced by the markup parser.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupParser
member.summary: Parses Markdown plus explicit OfficeIMO semantic fenced blocks into a profile-aware AST.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupParserOptions
member.summary: Options for parsing Markdown-inspired OfficeIMO markup into the semantic AST.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markup.OfficeMarkupValidator
member.summary: Validates that profile-specific AST nodes are only used in compatible authoring profiles.
